summary: All required changes were already committed on this branch. ADR-0001 has a Repository Map section with all four tracks (API Tests, Benchmark Tests, Mega Integration small/large) mapped to their external repos (omniverse-api-core-tests-srtx-api-test and omniverse-mega-dev). .fleet-testing.yaml has external_repo fields on all four tracks and external_path on mega_small and mega_large. PR #1 is open against main titled 'docs: add repository map to ADR-0001 and update fleet-testing.yaml'.
